design_philosophy: Clean, minimal, and appetizing. Emphasize generous whitespace, natural colors (terracotta, bone white), and high-contrast typography. Move away from generic tech-bro interfaces into a more tactile, editorial feel for food discovery. The UI should fade into the background, letting the food photography and typography do the heavy lifting.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing. Default section padding should be py-16 to py-24. Component padding should be p-6 to p-8.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use CSS grid for restaurant listings (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8). For dashboard, use a 12-column bento box approach with gap-6.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for large cards/images, rounded-xl for standard components, rounded-full for primary CTA buttons.

component_guidelines.buttons: Primary buttons should be solid Terracotta (#E05D36) with rounded-full geometry. Hover state: slight scale-up (scale-105) and shadow-lg. Secondary buttons should be warm gray (#F3EFEB) with text-foreground.
component_guidelines.cards: Restaurant and Food cards should be flat, Cardless or with a subtle border-border. Use bg-white or bg-secondary. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(26,26,26,0.08)]. No heavy drop shadows.
component_guidelines.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-border/50. Must have z-50.
component_guidelines.forms_inputs: Shadcn UI base. bg-white, border-border, rounded-xl. Focus state: ring-2 ring-primary/20 border-primary.
component_guidelines.badges_tags: Use soft pastel backgrounds (accent color) with primary text color. rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must have smooth transitions: transition-all duration-300 ease-out.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (translate-y-4 to 0) for lists and main content.
interactions_and_motion.micro_interactions: Active states on tabs or filters should use a pill-shaped background slider or simple underline. Image cards should zoom image (scale-105) inside a hidden overflow container on hover.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Text over images must have a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent).
accessibility.focus_states: All focusable elements must have clear focus-visible rings.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='restaurant-card-1').

media_and_assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke width consistent (1.5px).
media_and_assets.image_usage: Images should have rounded-2xl corners. Do not use generic placeholders. Use the provided high-quality URLs.

image_urls.description: Overhead aesthetic modern table setting with extreme negative space. Use as main hero background.
Minimal 3D scooter illustration for 'Fast Delivery' feature section or empty cart state.
Abstract organic shape background. Use for feature sections, footer background, or auth pages.
Gourmet burger flatlay. Use for featured dish or restaurant menu item.
Minimal fresh pizza slice. Use for featured dish or category thumbnail.
Warm modern cafe interior. Use as restaurant cover image.
Modern restaurant interior with warm lighting. Use as restaurant cover image.

pages_and_flows.customer_homepage: Hero section with 'hero_background' image, search bar overlaid. Below: 'Featured Restaurants' bento grid. Horizontal scroll categories with icon/image. Clean footer using 'texture_background'.
pages_and_flows.restaurant_listing: Grid layout (gap-8). Cards should feature high-quality images (aspect-[4/3]), bold titles, rating pill, and cuisine tags.
pages_and_flows.restaurant_detail: Large cover image at top (h-[40vh] to max-h-[60vh]). Overlapping white container for content (mt-[-4rem] rounded-t-3xl) to create depth. Menu items in a clean list or 2-column grid.
pages_and_flows.cart_and_checkout: Slide-out sheet for cart (Shadcn Sheet). Minimalist checkout form with clear progress indicators. Use 'success' color (#8A9A5B) for completed steps.
pages_and_flows.owner_admin_dashboard: Sidebar navigation (w-64). Main content area with dense but clean metrics bento grid. Tables for orders should be cardless with simple border-b on rows. Use Lucide icons for status (e.g., Clock for pending, Check for delivered).

developer_instructions: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Avoid custom CSS unless absolutely necessary for complex animations.
Initialize Shadcn UI and customize the border radius, colors, and fonts according to this JSON.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use Outfit and DM Sans.
All elements receiving user interaction MUST have `data-testid` attributes in kebab-case.
Apply `backdrop-blur` for sticky headers to maintain context while scrolling.
Images must never use generic placeholders. Fallback to the provided media URLs.
